creator: hselasky@FreeBSD.org
text:
Fix: 

The following patch fixes compile of flphoto:

> --- work/flphoto-1.3.1/Fl_Print_Dialog2.cxx.orig
> +++ work/flphoto-1.3.1/Fl_Print_Dialog2.cxx
> @@ -56,6 +56,7 @@
>
>  #ifdef HAVE_LIBCUPS
>  #  include <cups/cups.h>
> +#  include <cups/ppd.h>
>  #endif // HAVE_LIBCUPS
